message:
test(resolv): smoke-fuzz proptests for encode_domain_name (bd-s170)

Four smoke-fuzz proptests for DNS wire-format encoding:

fuzz_encode_domain_name_never_panics
  Arbitrary 0..1024-byte input. Must never panic.

fuzz_encode_domain_name_ends_with_root_label
  Every encoded output must terminate with the root label (0x00).
  A regression that forgot the terminator would produce queries the
  kernel refuses to dispatch.

fuzz_encode_domain_name_length_prefixes_under_64
  RFC 1035 §2.3.4: label length ≤ 63. Scans the output by following
  length prefixes, asserting each is ≤63 and each label stays within
  the output buffer.

fuzz_encode_domain_name_output_is_bounded
  Output size ≤ input_len + non_dot_bytes + 1. Rejects pathological
  expansion via label-inflation bugs.

Closes the resolver smoke-fuzz suite (bd-s170): four parsers, 13
proptests, ~6500 case evaluations per run covering parse_hosts_line,
parse_services_line, ResolverConfig::parse, and encode_domain_name.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
